column1: # RKNPU_DDU device manifest — TAB-separated. Lines starting with # are comments.
# Columns: model  detect_substr  soc  purge_pkg  deb_path  sha256  target  status
# detect_substr is matched as a substring of /proc/device-tree/model. It may hold
# several '|'-separated alternatives (no spaces around '|'); the row matches if ANY
# of them is a substring. Real OrangePi images report e.g. "RK3588S OPi 5 Pro", so
# we list the "OPi <model>" form (verified on hardware for 5 Pro) plus the
# ORDER MATTERS: more-specific names MUST come before the generic "OPi 5" row (last).
# their deb_path/sha256 are '-' and detect_substr/purge_pkg are best-guess until validated.

column2: OPi CM5 Tablet|Orange Pi CM5 Tablet
